learnings: Semantic screen helpers that inspect sections, token counts, and ANSI-stripped content make CLI tests durable while still proving redraw requirements.
For graceful CLI exit behavior, supplement in-process `run-game!` capture tests with subprocess assertions so exit code 0 is actually covered.
result_payload.summary: Expanded `test/ttt/core_test.clj` into durable behavioral coverage for terminal tic-tac-toe, including startup flow, numbered boards, alternating turns, strict/trimmed move parsing, occupied/out-of-range/non-numeric and blank/whitespace retries, row/column/diagonal wins, draws, scoreboard order/count persistence, play-again handling, required clear/redraw transitions, ANSI-colored marks, and the specified EOF/partial-EOF cases. Added subprocess-based assertions that graceful EOF paths exit with status 0, manually QA’d representative `make run` scenarios, ran `make check`, and passed the Ralph validator.
